name: Thundering Chorus
description: Notes Part of the Storm Caller Bard Set.
effects: Party Effect: Within 4.5 squares Inspired for 7 seconds. Lightning Strike: Deals 1200 Damage within 3 sqrs. Thundering Resonance: Creates 7 additional random explosions that each deal 200-250 damage within 2 sqrs. If Wind Dancer Robe equipped: Cast range of the lightning strike increased to 10 tiles If Augur of the Tempest equipped: Recursive thunder explosions to the lightning strike dealing 200-250 damage
